title: Anthem
content:
Spirit of Liberty,
    Wake in the Land!
    Sons of our Forefathers,
    Raise the strong hand!
    Burn in each heart anew
    Liberty's fires;
    Wave the old Flag again,
    Flag of our sires;
    Glow all thy stars again,
    Banner of Light!
    Wave o'er us forever,
    Emblem of might;
    God for our Banner!
    God for the Right!

    Minions of Tyranny,
    Tremble and kneel!
    The sons of the Pilgrims
    Are sharpening their steel.
    Pledge for our Land again
    Honor and life;
    Wave the old Flag again;
    On to the strife!
    Shades of our Forefathers,
    Witness our fright!
    Wave o'er us forever,
    Emblem of might;
    God for our Banner!
    God for our Right!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Hanford Lennox Gordon, titled "Anthem", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
